steps.title: Translate the lower bound
steps.content:
At least $30$ miles per hour means the speed can be $30$ or greater.
$$x\ge 30$$

steps.title: Translate the upper bound
steps.content: At most $70$ miles per hour means the speed can be $70$ or less. $$x\le 70$$ Together, the bounds are $$30\le x\le 70$$ The answer is C.
